integration_removed.description:
The TP-Link LTE integration has been removed from Home Assistant.

The integration has not been working since Home Assistant 2023.6.0, has no maintainer, and its underlying library depends on a package with a [critical security vulnerability]({ghsa_url}).

To resolve this issue, remove the `tplink_lte` configuration from your `configuration.yaml` file and restart Home Assistant.
integration_removed.title: The TP-Link LTE integration has been removed
